case_title: ELI LEE CRONBACH VS. UNITED AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ELI LEE CRONBACH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ILSI RODRIGUEZ. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRONBACH, ELI LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [#1] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRONBACH, ELI LEE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [#2] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRONBACH, ELI LEE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD) {CERTIFIED MAILING #1 - SACRAMENTO} COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CRONBACH, ELI LEE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
